channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rita Edochie denounces double standards in marriage advice over infidelity comments
item.description: Nollywood actress Rita Edochie has condemned a wedding MC for making controversial remarks about infidelity during a ceremony. The MC reportedly told a wife that cheating would lead to death and madne...

item.title: Osun journalists get training and grants to boost accountability reporting ahead of election
item.description: DevReporting, in partnership with the Centre for Journalism Innovation and Development (CJID), has launched a training and story grant program for journalists in Osun State ahead of the 2026 governors...

item.title: Vancouver Welcomes Over 30,000 Cruise Passengers During Peak Summer Travel Period
item.description: The article highlights the anticipated surge in cruise passenger numbers in Victoria, British Columbia, during one of the busiest weekends of the summer season. With nearly 30,000 travelers expected t...

item.title: Australia's EV Infrastructure Lags as Personal Feud with ABC Intensifies
item.description: John Birmingham’s article details his failed attempt to challenge the Australian Broadcasting Corporation’s (ABC) stance on electric vehicles (EVs), revealing deeper concerns about Australia’s inadequ...

item.title: Super Typhoon Inday Raises Wind Signal No. 1 in 7 Provinces as It Enters PAR
item.description: Super Typhoon Inday has intensified and entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR), prompting the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) to rais...

item.title: Uncontrolled Settlements Near Gilgit Heighten Glof Risks, Warn Scientists
item.description: The article highlights the growing risks of glacial lake outburst floods (Glofs) in Gilgit-Baltistan due to unchecked urbanization. Pakistan Space and Upper Atmosphere Research Commission (Suparco) wa...

item.title: ADNOC's Acquisition of Shell Downstream South Africa and Its Economic Impact
item.description: ADNOC Distribution has finalized a $1 billion deal to acquire 100% of Shell Downstream South Africa (SDSA), marking a significant step in its global expansion strategy. The acquisition includes 580 fu...

item.title: Shelley Duvall's 1990 TV Film 'Mother Goose Rock 'n' Rhyme' and Its Cult Following
item.description: This article explores Shelley Duvall's 1990 television film 'Mother Goose Rock 'n' Rhyme,' a passion project produced by her own company, Think Entertainment. The film, which blends fantasy and musica...

item.title: Cultural continuity through traditional net-making with Indigenous elders
item.description: The article details a project called 'Stories Behind the Fishing Net: Sitting with the Aunties' that revives traditional weaving practices on Widjabal Wia-bal Country in northern New South Wales. Led ...

item.title: Egyptian Team Criticizes Officiating After World Cup Loss to Argentina
item.description: The Egyptian national football team and its coaches expressed strong dissatisfaction with the officiating during their 3-2 loss to Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 16. Head coach Hossam H...

item.title: Argentina Overcomes Early Deficit to Defeat Egypt in FIFA World Cup
item.description: Argentina delivered a remarkable comeback in a thrilling FIFA World Cup clash against Egypt, securing a 3-2 victory that kept Lionel Messi's tournament hopes alive. The South American giants faced a d...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Golden Boot Race: Messi, Mbappe, Haaland, and Kane Vie for Top Scorer Title
item.description: The 2026 World Cup has entered a highly competitive phase for the Golden Boot, with Lionel Messi leading the race after scoring eight goals for Argentina. Kylian Mbappe trails with seven goals and two...

item.title: NCERT revises Class 8 Social Science textbook, removes controversial judiciary chapter
item.description: The National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) has released a revised Class 8 Social Science textbook following Supreme Court directives. The original version sparked controversy by...

item.title: Super Typhoon Inday Enters Philippine Area of Responsibility, Affects Northern Luzon
item.description: Super Typhoon Inday (Bavi) entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) on July 8, 2026, prompting PAGASA to raise Signal No. 1 for multiple regions in Luzon. The typhoon, located 1,405 km east...

item.title: Toronto FC addresses player health challenges amid injury crisis
item.description: Toronto FC, which has struggled with a severe injury list this season, has appointed Adam Brett as its new director of player health and high performance. The club has been without a dedicated sport s...

item.title: Trump's Secret Call to NFL Owner Ties Him to Epstein's World, Biographer Reveals
item.description: The article details a biographer's account of a secret call between former President Donald Trump and NFL owner Roger Goodell, linking Trump to the Epstein sex trafficking scandal. The call occurred d...

item.title: iOS 27 Beta 3 Introduces Customizable Siri, Live Recognition, and Other Enhancements
item.description: Apple's iOS 27 Beta 3 introduces several refinements ahead of its September 2026 launch. Key updates include customizable Siri voice settings for iPhone 17 Pro and Air models, leveraging on-device pro...

item.title: El-Rufai's Wife Pleads for Fair Treatment Amid Legal Challenges
item.description: Hajiya Asiya El-Rufai, wife of former Kaduna State Governor, has publicly appealed to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to ensure her husband, El-Rufai, receives fair treatment amid ongoing legal proceeding...

item.title: SIT Investigates Anil Mishra's Role in Failure to Enforce Frisking Norms at Ram Temple Donation Event
item.description: The Special Investigation Team (SIT) has launched an inquiry into the alleged negligence of Anil Mishra, a key figure in the Ram Temple donation management, for failing to enforce frisking norms durin...

item.title: Park Ji-hoon's Manila Concert Canceled, Moved to Macau
item.description: The Manila concert of South Korean actor Park Ji-hoon, known for his role in the K-drama 'Weak Hero Class,' has been canceled. Originally scheduled to take place in Manila, the event's venue has been ...
